programmes.show_description: The Ozark Howler. Jess and Phil venture deep into the Ozarks to investigate a mysterious predatory beast. New recordings of chilling howls lead to a shocking revelation. S3, Ep6
Alaskan Lake Monster. Phil and Jess search whitewater rapids and a frigid Alaskan lake for a legendary beast that's now the target of serious scientific inquiry. S3, Ep7
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Grand Theft Auto. The Baggage Battlers head to the Tampa Machinery Auction to bid on 1000's of lost or seized vehicles. But will they unearth any gems amongst the lot? S2, Ep10
Eye for an Eye. The Baggage Battlers are in Toronto for one of Canada's largest freight and baggage auctions. Billy makes one of his most shocking discoveries inside his winnings. S2, Ep11
The Miner's Code Part 1. Shawn and Vernon embark on a harrowing rescue mission on a stormy Bering Sea. Meanwhile, Zeke relaunches the Havilah with a wild crew. S11, Ep15
The Miner's Code Part 2. Shawn and Vernon embark on a harrowing rescue mission on a stormy Bering Sea. Meanwhile, Zeke relaunches the Havilah with a wild crew. S11, Ep16
Nathan And Steve. The team set out to install a full-scale hard rock mining operation and deliver a potentially life changing payday for rookies, Nathan Malatesta and Steve Ogilvie. S1, Ep6
Baby Alarm. Julia and her husband John deal with a snake hiding in the doorway of a house. Plus, a family with a baby have spotted a snake in their hoover. S1, Ep9
False Pass. Time Bandit heads into False Pass to a crab offloading spot. But in the midst of storms and sand bars they're close to sinking. Can they make it through safely? S6, Ep6
When Hell Freezes Over. On the Northwestern it's Edgar's birthday, and skipper Sig is worried about his advancing age. And, most of the fleet have to battle with deadly ice. S6, Ep7
A Race Against Time. The team pushes deeper into Snake Island than ever, tempting fate with every step, and they make a discovery that will change their lives. S1, Ep6
Samurai Sword Of Power. Josh Gates travels to ancient shrines hidden across Japan in search of the mystical Honjo Masamune sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai. S1, Ep11
Curse Of The Golden Bell. Josh Gates joins local divers in the Asian country of Myanmar to search for the Great Bell of King Dhammazedi. His hunt takes him into treacherous waters. S1, Ep12
Poisoned. Soil poisoned by coal production hampers a Kentucky homestead. The Raneys must build a hillside garden on the only unpolluted land and find a source of clean water. S2, Ep2
Flood, Sweat, & Tears - Part 1. A dangerous request from the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone forces the Raneys to build a dam and plan an entire cabin move. S2, Ep3
The Bishop invests in a massive new claim, but he has no money left over for equipment. Meanwhile, the Tunnel Rats risk electrocution as they hunt for crystal opal. S5, Ep6
The Misfits search for a new claim in Andamooka's dangerous opal fields. With no working machinery, the Opal Whisperers put their hopes into a bucket of Yowah Nuts. S5, Ep7
Winter Is Coming. A massive arctic storm blasts the fleet with hurricane-force winds and monster seas. And every captain must decide how much their boats and crews can handle. S12, Ep8
Into The Gale. Winter crab season brings this year's biggest storm. Every captain must choose - risk it all and head out into the storm or stay back, tied to dock losing money. S12, Ep9
My Giant Genitals. A Kenyan man developed a growth on his genitals as a boy, but it has swollen significantly. An American man with just one arm and finger gives motivational talks. S5, Ep5
Bubble Woman. A Brazilian woman's condition causes thousands of tiny tumours that bubble her skin. Plus, a 4-year-old boy in India has an enormous foot. S5, Ep6
Jacqui and Andrew encounter a crocodile as they camp on the banks of the Palmer River. Plus, the Ferals travel to Jarman Island to mine on untouched land. S7, Ep1
Waterworld. Dropped into the South China Sea, 12 elite survivalists try to survive 40 days on land and sea. Two all-star survivalists start a 60-day challenge in the Philippines. S4, Ep1
Surviving With Sharks. With resources dwindling, the survivalists risk their lives entering the shark-infested South China Sea in search of a meal they all desperately need. S4, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Timberville House. The team salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. They find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. S10, Ep11
Boulevard At Capital Centre. The guys get a big opportunity in suburban DC on the former site of the Capital Centre. Plus, Tay builds a breakfast table from an old car engine. S10, Ep12
The Gamble. This summer, the fleet bets it all on new tech, new claims, and new opportunities. Plus, Vernon's on the hunt for a new ship to launch his 'golden seahorse'. S5, Ep7
Pressure. With the season in full swing, Shawn brings in family to help reach his goal. The Kellys try to get familiar with their new claims and a familiar newcomer joins the fray. S5, Ep8
The Dirt Dogs invest in a hard rock mining plant. And, the Gold Gypsies are eager to be back in the field, but a $20,000 excavator repair is a tough start to the season. S4, Ep1
All You Can Eat. Julia helps a customer deal with a python in their garden with a particularly big belly. Plus, Julia and John race to get a python out of a tree. S1, Ep10
We're Not In Kansas Anymore. On the Northwestern, the exhausted crew struggles to keep up with Captain Sig's maniacal pace - and deckhand, Jake Anderson, pays the price in blood. S6, Ep8
Glory Days. A distress call is issued when a man on a vessel suffers a heart attack and the coastguard attempts a dramatic rescue in huge seas, with low fuel and low visibility. S6, Ep9
The Trail Of Blood. A vital clue on Snake Island sees the team in the perilous Paraguayan jungle. A historic artefact brings them closer to treasure - and life-threatening encounters. S2, Ep1
The Quest For King Arthur. Josh Gates traverses England, Wales and Scotland, wading through history and legend to search for evidence of a real King Arthur. S2, Ep1
The Real Robin Hood. Josh Gates journeys across England to uncover the true story behind Robin Hood. He explores underground tunnels and finds what may be his final resting place. S2, Ep2
Flood, Sweat, & Tears - Part 2. The Raneys must move an entire cabin into the flood zone as Marty's dam is tested. The surprise arrival of chicks means the coop needs an upgrade. S2, Ep13
Fire & Ice. The Raneys create their first-ever self-automated homestead in the fierce Alaskan wilderness while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty. S2, Ep4
The Blacklighters are forced to move their 10-ton processing plant to a new claim. Plus, the Cheals try to use abandoned truck parts to fix their agitator machine. S5, Ep8
As the Bushmen search for a partner, their new rookie ignores safety protocols and rushes into a deadly no-go zone. Plus, the Cheals attempt to revive their season. S5, Ep9
Proving Grounds. Jake is enraged when his deckhand falls asleep on night watch, putting the entire crew at risk. Plus, a monster wave hits the Time Bandit. S12, Ep10
Raw Deal. While Keith and Johnathan test the boundaries of partner fishing, Captain Jake struggles to stay cool with a problematic deckhand. Later, Wild Bill takes one for the team. S12, Ep11
Rigors Of The Job. As his crew completes government fixes in record time, Todd promises a gold bonus to all miners who finish the season - but one greenhorn struggles. S2, Ep8
Seaborne Sacrifice. Sig deploys a Norwegian secret weapon to locate the bairdi school. Meanwhile, in Dutch, crew drug tests threaten to leave them a man down. S20, Ep8
The Gold Retrievers chase off a late-night intruder. Shane and Russell venture out on a new expedition, while the Poseidon Crew make a big decision. S7, Ep2
